reviews.comment:
Una esquina clasica de Posadas, suele haber cola de vehiculos, hacen el 6% de descuento despues de la 0 Horas. Además si sos socio del ACA tenes 5% mas de descuento sin limite.

(Translated by Google)
A classic corner in Posadas, there's usually a line of vehicles. They offer a 6% discount after midnight. Plus, if you're an ACA member, you get an additional 5% discount with no limit.
